data.name: Funbag Fantasy 4
data.detailed_description:
This is the fourth installment of Waffle's much beloved Funbag Fantasy series! Written by noted large chest appreciator Kagami Hiroyuki, the series has received much praise for its engrossing world building and political storytelling, and, of course, the cast's rather generous "assets".

Funbag Fantasy 4 - Brother Astor, takes place in the medieval Kingdom of Litova 400 years prior to the events of the original Funbag Fantasy. Litovia finds itself in a difficult political situation with the ever increasing hostilities of the Confederation of Minotaur Tribes on its border, and the neighboring Kingdom of Armekia unwilling to form an alliance against them unless the Litovian queen agrees to wed their king——an offer with deep implications for the religious faction Litovia belongs to, and a price they deem too high to pay. Out of other options, the queen of Litovia is forced to order the monasteries on the border to organize to reenforce the kingdom's defenses. One such monastery is Berensch, to which brother Astor, our protagonist, belongs... Will the queen's decision save or doom her kingdom? And what will become of brother Astor?

From the cheerful Lizel to the stern bishopess Ischtovia or even the regal elven queen Celestia, there's a busty beauty for every taste all designed by eroge veteran Q-Gaku! The game's over 400 beautifully rendered CGs will allow you to enjoy every side of the cast... and from multiple positions.
data.about_the_game:
This is the fourth installment of Waffle's much beloved Funbag Fantasy series! Written by noted large chest appreciator Kagami Hiroyuki, the series has received much praise for its engrossing world building and political storytelling, and, of course, the cast's rather generous "assets".

Funbag Fantasy 4 - Brother Astor, takes place in the medieval Kingdom of Litova 400 years prior to the events of the original Funbag Fantasy. Litovia finds itself in a difficult political situation with the ever increasing hostilities of the Confederation of Minotaur Tribes on its border, and the neighboring Kingdom of Armekia unwilling to form an alliance against them unless the Litovian queen agrees to wed their king——an offer with deep implications for the religious faction Litovia belongs to, and a price they deem too high to pay. Out of other options, the queen of Litovia is forced to order the monasteries on the border to organize to reenforce the kingdom's defenses. One such monastery is Berensch, to which brother Astor, our protagonist, belongs... Will the queen's decision save or doom her kingdom? And what will become of brother Astor?

From the cheerful Lizel to the stern bishopess Ischtovia or even the regal elven queen Celestia, there's a busty beauty for every taste all designed by eroge veteran Q-Gaku! The game's over 400 beautifully rendered CGs will allow you to enjoy every side of the cast... and from multiple positions.
data.short_description: 400 years earlier than the events of the 1st game, the Kingdom of Litovia was bordered by two powers, both of which put great pressure on the kingdom. They've ordered the monasteries near the border to organize their own garrisons to defend themselves, and Astor was among the monks who lived there.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Core2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 3 / Radeon 8500
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: PCM
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 6600 / Radeon X700XT

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7+
  • Processor: Core2 Duo
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce 3 / Radeon 8500
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: PCM
